text:
CASE OF INFLIXIMAB INFUSIONS
(REMICADE ©)
Recently there has been a version (a biosimilar) of
infliximab (infliximab is the active substance of Remicade® and its biosimilars), in the form of
pre-filled syringes that can be obtained in
pharmacy and self-injected at home.
So if you have to go regularly to
the hospital for infliximab infusions, and
this causes you problems at work, talk
to your doctor; this new product may
solve your problem if your doctor
considers it appropriate for your medical situation.

ER AE EEE
+ Contact our social worker every Monday
afternoon from 2:00 to 6:00 PM by phone:
01 43 07 00 63 / By email: social@afa.asso.fr
+ A Work helpline is also available
on Wednesday afternoons from 2:00 to 6:00 PM:
By phone: 01 43 07 00 63 /
By email: travail@afa.asso.fr
+ The topic fact sheets
{on RQTH, income during sick leave, etc)
https://www.afa.asso.fr/mediatheque-boutique/fiches-
thematiques/
